## Week in Review: 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-22

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 33.4.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **Liberal**: Avg interest 4.0 (+64.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.20)

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 33.4 (+444.2% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.12)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
